work_unit: Q02 infrastructure repair for diverse DWX matrix coverage
root_cause: Pending Q02 work items referenced DWX matrix setfiles with magic slot offsets beyond the registered QM5_10481 range, causing OnInit EA_MAGIC_NOT_REGISTERED failures.
repo_fix_summary: Added QM5_10481 magic-number registry coverage for slots 14-36, extending the EA from 14 to 37 DWX matrix symbols.
Regenerated canonical RISK_FIXED M15 backtest setfiles for the full DWX matrix.
Moved the news gate below open-position management and exit handling so blackout logic gates entries only.

farm_db_repair.skipped_reason: AUDJPY.DWX pending row uses an ablation setfile variant and was left untouched.

verification.smoke_or_backtest: not launched; farm already had 6 active backtest work items, so CPU ceiling constraint applied

scope_notes: No T_Live files or AutoTrading settings touched.
No portfolio gate or T_Live manifest touched.
Unrelated dirty worktree files were left untouched.
